top_signals.title: China Warns EU of Retaliation as Bloc Mulls Tougher Trade Curbs
top_signals.summary: China will take countermeasures if the European Union presses ahead with new restrictions on Chinese imports, a Ministry of Commerce official said, as trade tensions between the two blocs continue to rise.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
